authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: capture_baseline
tools.description: Capture a baseline snapshot from sample input/output pairs. Stores latency, token usage, output length, error rate, and semantic fingerprints.

tools.name: compare_performance
tools.description: Compare new outputs against baseline. Returns drift scores (0-100), alert level, degradation details, and recommendations.

tools.name: get_trend
tools.description: Get drift trend data over time (7/30 days). Returns time-series points for charting plus summary stats.

tools.name: list_baselines
tools.description: List all stored baseline snapshots for an agent with metrics summaries.
